nativeProps: React.ButtonHTMLAttributes<HTMLButtonElement> with role, type, name, value, and aria-checked reserved

props.name: name
props.type: string; emits explicit hidden form value

props.name: onLabel
props.default: switch.on provider key with English fallback

props.name: offLabel
props.default: switch.off provider key with English fallback

compositionPolicy.semantics: A native button exposes role=switch and aria-checked; it is never a submit button.
compositionPolicy.serialization: When named, one hidden successful control always serializes distinct explicit on or off values; localization never changes them.
compositionPolicy.required: Required-on validation is intentionally unsupported because a hidden input cannot model the switch constraint.
